summary: Raw, single-camera footage of VP Vance speaking at a podium in front of a crowd holding 'PROTECTING TAXPAYER DOLLARS' signs, attacking Maine Gov. Janet Mills over Medicaid/Medicare fraud and sanctuary policies. Static framing, continuous talking transcript, no music or stylized editing. Plain campaign-event speech, not youth-appeal produced content.
notable_text: On-screen audience signs: 'PROTECTING TAXPAYER DOLLARS'; podium seal 'PRESIDENT OF THE UNITED STATES'.
